# Dayton Relo — AI Context File

## About This Site
Dayton Relo is the official website of Chris Jurgens, a licensed Ohio Realtor (Team Flory · eXp Realty) specializing in military PCS moves to Wright-Patterson AFB, corporate relocation, and local home buying in Dayton, Ohio.

## Contact
- Name: Chris Jurgens
- Phone: (937) 241-3484
- Email: Chris@cjohio.com
- License: Ohio Realtor, Team Flory · eXp Realty

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://daytonrelo.com
- MLS Listings: https://daytonrelo.com/listings
- Military PCS Guide: https://daytonrelo.com/military
- All Tools: https://daytonrelo.com/tools

## Free Tools
- Mortgage Calculator: https://daytonrelo.com/tools/mortgage-calculator
- BAH Calculator (WPAFB 2025 rates): https://daytonrelo.com/tools/bah-calculator
- Closing Cost Estimator: https://daytonrelo.com/tools/closing-costs
- Rent vs Buy Calculator: https://daytonrelo.com/tools/rent-vs-buy
- Cost of Living Comparison: https://daytonrelo.com/tools/cost-of-living
- PCS Timeline Tracker: https://daytonrelo.com/tools/pcs-timeline
- On-Base vs Off-Base Guide: https://daytonrelo.com/tools/on-base-vs-off
- DITY/PPM Calculator: https://daytonrelo.com/tools/dity-calculator
- TLE Calculator: https://daytonrelo.com/tools/tle-calculator
- First 30 Days Checklist: https://daytonrelo.com/tools/first-30-days
- Neighborhood Compare: https://daytonrelo.com/tools/neighborhood-compare
- Neighborhood Quiz: https://daytonrelo.com/tools/neighborhood-quiz
- School Guide: https://daytonrelo.com/tools/schools
- Commute Finder: https://daytonrelo.com/tools/commute-finder
- Employer Map: https://daytonrelo.com/tools/employer-map

## Service Area
Dayton, Beavercreek, Centerville, Kettering, Springboro, Fairborn, Miamisburg, Huber Heights, Xenia, Oakwood, Vandalia, Trotwood, Ohio

## Specializations
- Military PCS relocation to WPAFB (Wright-Patterson Air Force Base)
- VA loan guidance and preferred lender referrals
- Corporate relocation package negotiation
- BAH optimization and housing selection
- First-time home buyers
- Investment properties
